title: aster sedifolius var. viscosus
intro: Aster sedifolius var. viscosus, also known as sticky aster or viscid aster, is a shrubby perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Aster sedifolius var. viscosus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into infusions or tinctures, which can be applied topically to the affected area or taken internally as a treatment for various health issues.
